svg.title: Offshore Co. — horizontal lockup
svg.desc: The primary horizontal lockup: the mark on the left at 256x256, the wordmark OFFSHORE CO. in DM Sans 500 tracked uppercase to the right, baseline aligned so cap-height center matches mark center. Both elements use currentColor. The font-size is 140 and letter-spacing is 30 user units (approximately 0.21em, between the brand's --caps-track and --caps-tight values). ViewBox is 1760 by 320 with 32 unit padding. For high-volume print delivery, open this file in Figma or Illustrator and convert the text element to outlines before exporting — vendor workflows can't rely on the DM Sans font being installed at the production house.
